creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
2014-02-09 13:50 GMT+04:00 <rm@freebsd.org>:
>
> Synopsis: Request: I2P software
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: rm
> State-Changed-When: Sun Feb 9 09:50:16 UTC 2014
> State-Changed-Why:
> sakamoti, most of the links are redirecting to i2p resources. If there
> are no public internet places where this software may be downloaded,
> there is no way to add this to Ports Collection. Would you please
> provide non-i2p references?
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=186555
There are no public internet places for some project. You can use
i2p.us , i2p.me or i2p.to gateway or marking like ignore and fetch
itself.
http://echelon.i2p.us/ for all project
https://geti2p.net/en/docs/applications/supported

source for all project
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w?a=project_list
http://git.repo.i2p.us/



Imule:
http://echelon.i2p.us/imule/
http://imule.i2p.us
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w/iaMule.git

I2P Bitcoin client:
http://echelon.i2p.us/btci2p/
https://github.com/VirtualDestructor/bitcoin-qt-i2p
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w/bitcoin-i2p.git
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w/bitcoin-qt-i2p.git
https://bitcointalk.org/index.php?topic=151181.0

I2Phex:
http://echelon.i2p.us/i2phex/
http://echelon.i2p.us/i2phex/3.2.6.106
http://sourceforge.net/projects/phex/

Pebcache:
http://echelon.i2p.us/pebcache/



OurFileSystem:
http://echelon.i2p.us/ofs/
http://sourceforge.net/projects/ourfilesystem/

I2Pmessenger(old): Do not work with Mono (GUI)?
http://forum.i2p.us/viewtopic.php?t=2474
http://echelon.i2p.us/i2pmessenger/


I2Pmessenger QT:
http://echelon.i2p.us/qti2pmessenger


Robert torrent client:
http://echelon.i2p.us/robert/
http://bob.i2p.us/Robert.html

PyBit bittorrent client:
http://echelon.i2p.us/pybit
http://echelon.i2p.us/pysamlib

Jwebcache:
http://forum.i2p.us/viewtopic.php?p=9486#9486
http://stats.i2p.us/i2p/plugins/
http://echelon.i2p.us/jwebcache/

Transmission:
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w/transmission-i2p.git
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w/transmission-trunk.git
http://git.repo.i2p.us/w/transmission.git


GarliCat:
http://www.cypherpunk.at/ocat/download/Source/0.2.0/unofficial
http://echelon.i2p.us/garlicat

Nachtblitz: Do not work with Mono?
http://echelon.i2p.us/nachtblitz

SIC - a simple chat client
http://echelon.i2p.us/sic

I2PTalk:  Do not work with Mono?
http://echelon.i2p.us/i2ptalk
